author: nero_eth
content: addressed all comments. Looks good now, thanks!

author: taulepton_
content: <@755590043632140352> one EIP8025 interaction worth flagging: the ProofEngine (used for validating proofs) has no separate sync network, so the CL MUST download every unfinalized ExecutionPayload (we use the finalized slot as the trust anchor during sync). Wanted to flag this to ensure CL devs support disabling independent sync for blocks above finality (maybe this is default behaviour anyway - I'm not sure). cc: <@792404665068158998> who has both EIP8025 and EIP8237 context for comment.
